content.text:
{
  "dimension": "perceptual-accuracy",
  "score": 1,
  "rationale": "The coach engages almost entirely at the content/topic level and never names how the client is showing up. Turn 2 offers a generic emotional label ('that's a heavy feeling') but it is asserted rather than observed, and there is no specific somatic, linguistic, or energetic read anywhere in the conversation. The coach misses obvious reads: the linguistic caveat in Turn 1 ('feel selfish even asking'), the hedging 'I think' and 'maybe' (Turns 5, 7) signaling the client not fully landing in the want, and the make-up-for-it move in Turn 11 that signals guilt/childhood-imprinting territory. Reads never precede questions — questions are asked blind, oriented to topic (what's underneath, what are you afraid of) rather than to the client's stance. By Turn 12 the coach jumps to a reframe without ever having named what was visible in the field.",
  "evidence_turns": [2, 4, 6, 8, 10, 12],
  "turn_annotations": [
    {"turn": 2, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Generic mood-label ('heavy feeling') asserted, not observed; no specific read of the caveat 'even asking' or the verdict-seeking stance."},
    {"turn": 4, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Blind question about what's underneath — no read named first."},
    {"turn": 6, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Reframes content ('not selfish — body asking for rest') without naming anything about how the client is showing up."},
    {"turn": 8, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Topic-level question about fear; misses the tentative 'yeah, maybe' that signaled the client hadn't landed."},
    {"turn": 10, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Hypothetical question with no read of the client's current state."},
    {"turn": 12, "polarity": "-", "annotation": "Names a content-level pattern ('deep generosity') but not a perceptual read; misses the make-up-for-it move as a guilt/imprinting signal and jumps to spiritual reframe."}
  ],
  "expected_territory_hits": [],
  "expected_territory_misses": ["linguistic-caveat"],
  "notes": "Coach operates entirely on content. No visible somatic, energetic, or linguistic reads anywhere in the transcript."
}
